seoTitle: Boat Harbour vs Bobin — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Boat Harbour and Bobin. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Boat Harbour vs Bobin: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Boat Harbour and Bobin.
heading: Boat Harbour vs Bobin — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Boat Harbour, New South Wales and Bobin, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Bobin has a lower overall climate risk score (48/100) compared to Boat Harbour (50/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Boat Harbour or Bobin safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Boat Harbour has a flood risk score of 45/100, while Bobin scores 49/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Boat Harbour scores 64/100 for bushfire risk. Bobin scores 50/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Boat Harbour or Bobin?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Bobin has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 3.05% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
